title: Missing Runners
description:
You are organizing a marathon with N runners. Every runner is given a distinct number from 1 to N, so they can be easily identified.

You record the number of each runner as they cross the finish line. Unfortunately, you notice that only N − 1 runners have finished. Which runner is still out there?
input: The first line of input contains the integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 215). The next line contains N −1 distinct integers in the range from 1 to N, representing the numbers of runners who have crossed the finish line.
output: Output the number of the runner who has not crossed the finish line.
source: Contest, Waterloo's local Programming Contests, 30 September, 2018
